allow:
Bash(git -C /Users/iosifplyats/Documents/cursor/agents/master-agent-claude commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix deploy scripts to include all required env vars

deploy-agent.sh was missing GCP_PROJECT_ID, GCP_LOCATION,
GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI, AGENT_PROMPT_ID — causing them
to be dropped on redeploy \(--set-env-vars replaces all\).
Also set AGENT_ENGINE_ID default in both scripts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/iosifplyats/Documents/cursor/agents/master-agent-claude commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix VertexAi session ID: use list_sessions instead of custom IDs

VertexAiSessionService rejects custom session IDs like
"tg_dm_234759359". Now uses list_sessions to find existing
sessions and lets server auto-generate IDs on creation.
InMemorySessionService path unchanged for backwards compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/iosifplyats/Documents/cursor/agents/master-agent-claude commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Sanitize conversation IDs for Vertex AI compatibility

Replaces underscores and other invalid characters with hyphens
in user_id before passing to VertexAiSessionService. Telegram
sends IDs like tg_dm_234759359 which become tg-dm-234759359.
No changes needed in Telegram bot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/iosifplyats/Documents/cursor/agents/master-agent-claude commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix session-info message count: fetch full session for events

list_sessions returns summaries without events, so message_count
was always 0. Now calls get_session with the found session_id
to retrieve full event history.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/iosifplyats/Documents/cursor/agents/master-agent-claude commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix session-info: skip slow get_session, add error logging

Fetching full session with all events was slow/unreliable.
Now uses summary from list_sessions. Also logs errors instead
of silently swallowing them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
